name: ManaVortex
subtitle: Commander game tracker for Magic: The Gathering
description: Local-first, offline Commander life tracker. Track life totals, commander damage, poison counters, and game history — no account, no internet required.

apps.name: ManaVortex
apps.subtitle: Commander game tracker for Magic: The Gathering
apps.localizedDescription: Track your Magic: The Gathering Commander games locally. Log life totals, commander damage, poison counters, monarch, and more. Full game history with statistics — no account or internet connection required.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to scan Magic: The Gathering cards for collection tracking
